nodes.text: Is there a question about my address?

responses.text: Can you confirm the address we have on file?
We need a current address for your prescription records.

nodes.text: Sure, it should be the same one on my ID. Has it not updated?

responses.text: It matches perfectly. We're all set.

nodes.text: Of course. The address on my card is still current. I haven't moved.

responses.text: Perfect, I'll keep that on file. Thank you.

nodes.text: No, I've been at the same place for a while now. It should all match.

responses.text: Alright, everything checks out. Thanks for confirming.

nodes.text: No problem at all. Happy to help!
